data.body:
## Description

Create `plugins/dso/skills/sprint/prompts/red-task-escalation.md` — shared escalation prompt template consumed by sprint (this story) and fix-bug (Story 79a6-2094).

Template content:
- Three-tier escalation protocol: sonnet attempt (dso:red-test-writer) → opus evaluation on failure (dso:red-test-evaluator with REVISE/REJECT/CONFIRM) → opus retry on REJECT → user escalation
- REVISE handling: requeue affected tasks in next batch
- REJECT handling: immediate retry with opus-tier RED agent
- CONFIRM handling: close task without implementation (TDD infeasible)
- Max one REVISE per task before user escalation
- Retry failure → user escalation

Reference the contract docs:
- plugins/dso/docs/contracts/red-test-writer-output.md (writer output schema)
- plugins/dso/docs/contracts/red-test-evaluator-verdict.md (evaluator verdict schema)

## File Impact
- CREATE: plugins/dso/skills/sprint/prompts/red-task-escalation.md

## TDD Requirement
test-exempt: prompt template with no conditional logic. Exemption criterion 3 (static assets).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `ruff check` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
- [ ] Template exists
  Verify: test -f $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/sprint/prompts/red-task-escalation.md
- [ ] Contains escalation tiers
  Verify: grep -q 'REVISE' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/sprint/prompts/red-task-escalation.md && grep -q 'REJECT' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/sprint/prompts/red-task-escalation.md && grep -q 'CONFIRM' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/sprint/prompts/red-task-escalation.md
- [ ] References both contract docs
  Verify: grep -q 'red-test-writer-output' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/sprint/prompts/red-task-escalation.md && grep -q 'red-test-evaluator-verdict' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/sprint/prompts/red-task-escalation.md
